tasks.description: IronEdit - Judas Hammer footage: Find Judas Hammer raw footage on Seagate 2TB portable drive, run full IronEdit pipeline (silence removal, jump cuts, color grading, audio normalization, thumbnail, SEO), save finished video to Desktop

Solomon's Shop UI/UX: Research best AI interface designs (Manus AI, Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity). Compile design brief for Solomon's Shop desktop app. Focus on navigation patterns, color schemes, typography, interaction design, what makes users want to keep using the interface.
steps: Search: best AI interface design patterns 2025
Search: Manus AI interface design seamless UX
Search: Claude ChatGPT interface design comparison
Search: desktop app UI design trends 2025 dark mode
Compile design brief and send to Jed
